name: HWM_TM_D_TM_UI_STATUS_V
query: SELECT statuses.status_id, statuses.tm_bldg_blk_id, statuses.tm_bldg_blk_version, statuses.status_value, statuses.tm_status_def_id FROM hwm_tm_active_status_v statuses WHERE statuses.status_def_cd = 'D_TM_UI_STATUS' /** FROM hwm_tm_statuses statuses WHERE statuses.date_from <= sysdate AND statuses.date_to >= sysdate AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hwm_tm_status_def_b WHERE statuses.tm_status_def_id = tm_status_def_id AND status_def_cd = 'D_TM_UI_STATUS' ) **/
